title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD (Pixel Diffusion) is an Nvidia image model for generating high-resolution 4K images, available as free and open-source software. It can be deployed via ComfyUI workflows and compared favorably to competing models like SeedVR2. The video demonstrates installation, usage, and upscaling workflows.
